sourcesContent:
export const adminDashboardDesign = {
  colors: {
    overlay:
      "fixed inset-0 bg-black/40 z-40 lg:hidden",
    input:
      "px-3 py-2 rounded-md border border-gray-300 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 text-sm w-full sm:w-64",
  },

  layout: {
    wrapper: "flex flex-col h-screen bg-gray-100",

    navbar:
      "h-16 flex items-center justify-between px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 bg-white border-b shadow-sm",

    body: "flex flex-1 overflow-hidden relative",

    sidebar: `
      fixed lg:static
      top-0 left-0
      h-full lg:h-auto
      w-1/2 sm:w-1/2 md:w-1/2 lg:w-64
      bg-gray-900 text-gray-300
      z-50 lg:z-auto
      p-6 space-y-6
      overflow-y-auto
      transform transition-transform duration-300
    `,

    content:
      "flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-4 sm:p-6 lg:p-8",
  },

  navbar: {
    menuButton: "lg:hidden text-2xl text-gray-700",

    avatarWrapper: "relative",

    avatar:
      "w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-indigo-600 text-white flex items-center justify-center font-semibold cursor-pointer",
  },

  dropdown: {
    wrapper:
      "absolute right-0 mt-3 w-64 bg-white shadow-lg rounded-lg p-4 z-50",

    header:
      "border-b pb-3 mb-3 font-semibold text-gray-800 text-sm",

    item:
      "flex items-center gap-2 p-2 rounded-md hover:bg-gray-100 cursor-pointer text-sm",

    logout:
      "flex items-center gap-2 p-2 rounded-md hover:bg-gray-100 cursor-pointer text-sm text-red-500",
  },

  sidebar: {
    header:
      "flex items-center justify-between mb-6 text-white",

    closeButton:
      "text-xl lg:hidden",

    nav: "space-y-2",

    navItem:
      "flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg transition cursor-pointer text-sm font-medium hover:bg-gray-800 hover:text-white",
  },
};
